forecast-period.text: A low pressure system lies north of Kangaroo Island, with an associated trough over central districts. The low is expected to move north and over the Eyre Peninsula and towards the Flinders district today, weakening as it moves into NSW on Wednesday. A weak ridge of high pressure begins to move across SA later in the week. A cold front is expected to move over the west of SA on Friday.
For latest warnings go to www.bom.gov.au, subscribe to RSS feeds, call 1300 659 210* or listen for warnings on relevant TV and radio broadcasts.
* Calls to 1300 numbers cost around 27.5c incl. GST, higher from mobiles or public phones.

Showers across most districts, less likely across the far north. Isolated thunderstorms possible over Eyre Peninsula, Flinders and southern parts of the pastoral districts. Chance of morning fog patches through central parts of the state. East to southeasterly about central and southeastern districts, tending west to southwesterly about the west and north. Winds fresh at times about the coast.

Isolated showers, becoming less likely during the afternoon and evening. Chance of morning fog patches on and east of the ranges. Maximum temperatures near to below average. Southwest to southeasterly winds, tending northwesterly in the far northeast during the morning.

Morning fog patches about the agricultural area and western districts. Isolated showers about southern coasts and ranges. Maximum temperatures near to below average. Southwest to southeasterly winds, tending northerly in the west.

text.p: Isolated showers about western coasts and the southern agricultural area tending scattered about southern and central coasts. Maximum temperatures near to below average. light winds becoming northwesterly ahead of a westerly change moving across western and central districts.

Cumulative rainfall totals to the end of Friday: 1 to 5 mm about the pastoral districts. 5 to 15 mm across the agricultural areas, Flinders district and western coasts, increasing to 15 to 30 mm Kangaroo Island, southern parts of Yorke and Fleurieu Peninsulas and southeastern districts.
